sigWerErrors.reason: The only difference is the addition of a comma, which is a punctuation difference and should be ignored according to the guidance.

'adresime' (to my email address) and 'adresimi' (my email address as object) have different grammatical cases in Turkish. This changes the meaning from requesting to send to the address (adresime) to requesting to send the address itself (adresimi), which significantly alters the intent of the sentence.
